sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41720" key="e)pi/yektos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπίψεκτος</orth>, <sense id="n41720.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">εὐεπίψογος</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope> </bibl> (=<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope> </bibl>).<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
